title: Alien Evo Addon: Female Aliens
description: Add female variants to Alien Evolution!
body:
**_You want to have female aliens on Alien evo? Now you can!_**

With this addon for Alien Evo your aliens will become their female counterparts.

Also, their appearances will try to be the most "canon" to OS series, what do i mean? A Tetramand will have muscles, Arburian pelarotas will not be skinny, all the designs try to be as female they can without the aliens losing what they are.

_**The uniforms change from Ben´s ones, i make them in my style.**_


How to use the fem aliens!:

Is a command everyone can use, is /female

DON´T USE IT ON ALIENS WITHOUT BEING COMPATIBLE, IT WILL CRASH!



Addons confirmed to be compatible in the discord!:

https://discord.gg/fwHEae8frQ



How to install?



- Install the mod (duh)
 
- Put it on the mods foulder

- Don´t put it on the toaster!
